title: 72pcs Glow Sticks Party Pack for Kids and Adults, LED Light Up Sticks Glow in The Dark Fun Party Supplies for Birthday, Christmas, New Year Party
features: High quality: This approx. 26 cm long LED light stick Made of plastic, lightweight and durable. Good quality, no smell, recyclable.
Long-lasting batteries: The 3 button batteries are already included in the delivery, so the glow stick can be used immediately and enjoy all night long.

3 Flash modes: Three flash modes are provided and flashing with different colours in turn. When you press the switch once, the light flashes continuously. When you press it again, the light flashes very quickly. When you press the button the third time, the three LED indicators flash first one after the other and then quickly. LED lights ensure a long service life.

Perfect for Many Occasions: fun holiday light up stick toy kids party accessories, perfect for Christmas decorations, birthday parties, school decorations, weddings, camping, on occasion, Easter gifts, kids party bag filler and kids party accessories.
24-hour services: Customer satisfaction is our top priority.If you have any questions about the items you received, please feel free to contact us.
